main-translation: And the woman *forensically* inspected the tree, *observing* that it was *functionally* good for food, and that it was *aesthetically* desirable to the eyes, and a tree *specifically* desirable for imparting *unauthorized* wisdom; so she *specifically* took of its fruit and ate, and she also *specifically* gave to her husband who was with her, and he ate.
And the eyes of both of them were *supernaturally* opened, and they *personally* knew that they were naked; and they sewed fig leaves together and *specifically* fashioned girdles for themselves.

And they heard the *forensic* voice of Yahweh God *specifically* walking in the garden in the *cool* breeze of the day; and the man and his wife *specifically* hid themselves from the presence of Yahweh God in the middle of the trees of the garden.
And Yahweh God *legally* summoned the man and *forensically* interrogated him, "Where *exactly* are you?"
And he answered, "I heard Your *forensic* voice in the garden, and I was *overwhelmed with* fear because I was naked; so I *specifically* hid myself."
And He *forensically* interrogated, "Who *specifically* informed you that you were naked? Have you *specifically* eaten from the tree from which I *legally* commanded you *absolutely* not to eat?"
And the man *adversarially* answered, "The woman whom You *specifically* placed here with me, she *specifically* gave to me from the tree, and I ate."
And Yahweh God *legally* interrogated the woman, "What *exactly* is this that you have done?" and the woman *adversarially* answered, "The serpent *specifically* deceived me, and I ate."

And Yahweh God *legally* declared to the serpent, "Because you have *specifically* done this, you are *forensically* cursed above all the cattle and above every wild beast of the field; upon your belly you shall *continually* go, and dust you shall *continually* eat all the days of your life!"

And I will *permanently* set enmity between you and between the woman, and between your *adversarial* seed and between her *covenantal* Seed; He shall *violently* crush your head, and you shall *adversarially* crush His heel."

To the woman He *legally* declared, "I will *exceedingly* multiply your pain and your conception; in *intense* pain you shall bear sons; and your *intense* desire shall be for your husband, and he shall *legally* exercise dominion over you."

And to Adam He *legally* declared, "Because you have *specifically* listened to the voice of your wife, and have *specifically* eaten from the tree of which I *legally* commanded you, *decreeing*: 'You shall *absolutely* not eat from it'; the ground is *forensically* cursed for your sake; in *intense* pain you shall *continually* eat from its produce all the days of your life."
"Both thorns and thistles it shall *continually* cause to sprout for you; and you shall *continually* eat the herb of the field."

"By the *intense* sweat of your faces you shall *continually* eat bread, until your *forensic* return to the ground, for from it you were *specifically* taken; for dust you are *materially*, and to dust you shall *inevitably* return."
And the man *legally* designated the name of his wife *as* Eve, because she was the *archetypal* mother of all living.
And Yahweh God *specifically* fashioned for Adam and for his wife coats of skin, and He *legally* clothed them.

And Yahweh God *legally* deliberated, "Behold, the man has *forensically* become as one of Us, to *personally* know good and evil; and now, lest he *specifically* put forth his hand and take also from the Tree of Life and eat, and live for the *entire* age—"
Therefore, Yahweh God *legally* expelled him from the garden of Eden to *continually* cultivate the ground from which he was *specifically* taken.

So He *forcibly* drove out the man; and He *legally* stationed the Cherubim at the east of the garden of Eden, with the *radiant* flame of the sword that *perpetually* turned in every direction to *vigilantly* guard the way to the Tree of Life.

And the man *personally and intimately* knew Eve his wife; and she conceived and bore Cain, and she *forensically* declared, "I have *specifically* gotten a man with the *direct intervention of* Yahweh!"
